items.headline: Claude Code can now gate tools by parameter
items.body: Claude Code 2.1.178 adds `Tool(param:value)` syntax to permission rules, letting you match specific tool inputs rather than just tool names — wildcards included, so `Agent(model:opus)` allows opus calls while blocking others. the same release tightens nested `.claude/` directory handling so the closest config file wins on name collisions. both changes are useful for ADO MCP Server development, where scoping what Claude can invoke during a session is currently coarser than it should be.
